authors: Edina Strikovic Hannes Cools Amsterdam School of Communication Research
raw_title: Reality Re-Imag(in)ed. Mapping Publics’ Perceptions and Evaluations of AI-Generated Images in News Contexts
title_en: Reality Re-Imag(in)ed. Mapping Publics’ Perceptions and Evaluations of AI-Generated Images in News Contexts
title_zh: 现实再想象：公众对新闻语境中AI生成图像的感知与评价映射
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了公众如何看待和评价新闻中使用的AI生成图像。它旨在了解人们对这些图像的真实性、可信度和影响的看法。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how the public perceives and evaluates AI-generated images used in news. It aims to understand people's views on the authenticity, credibility, and impact of these images.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注数字新闻中AI生成视觉内容的公众接受度和社会影响，属于媒体效果和视觉传播领域。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on public acceptance and societal impact of AI-generated visual content in digital journalism, falling within media effects and visual communication studies.
